title: Satellite-Based City-Scale Flux Estimates
text: This project estimates CO₂ and NOₓ city-scale fluxes for global cities globally using OCO-3 and TROPOMI satellite observations, and compares them with bottom-up inventories (EDGAR, ODIAC, GPC).

title: Satellite-Based City-Scale Flux Estimates
text:
Key Result



CO₂ emissions vs. GDP per capita across C40 cities, colored by region. Circle size represents city population.
